heading: Office of Federal Procurement Policy
label: 506 Office of Federal Procurement Policy
text: The Office of Federal Procurement Policy, established under , is an office in the Office of Management and Budget.section 1101(a) of title 41
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)504(no source).The section is included to provide in subchapter I of chapter 5 of title 31 a complete list of the organizational units established by law that are in the Office of Management and Budget or are subject to the direction and supervision of the Director of the Office of Management and Budget.
